description_long: This bird features a striking contrast between its golden-yellow head and nape and its predominantly black body, wings, and tail. The beak is slender, straight, and pointed, well-suited for probing or picking. The wings and tail are long and streamlined, with subtle white markings visible on the wings. The eyes are dark and set against the bright yellow plumage of the head, giving the bird a sharp, alert appearance. The legs are short and dark, blending into the overall dark coloration of the body. The bird's plumage is smooth and sleek, with a glossy finish that suggests a healthy, well-groomed individual.
description: A bird with a golden-yellow head and nape, contrasted by a sleek black body, wings, and tail, featuring a pointed beak and subtle white wing markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bird, highlighting the yellow head and black body with a long, straight tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the streamlined body, yellow head, and the symmetry of the black wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pointed beak, yellow head, and the elongated black tail feathers.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the head and the tapering black tail, with the yellow nape partially visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid yellow head and nape with a solid black body, wings, and tail; small white wing patches.
